title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fufu ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gone and done it now... never would've thought that some scrub like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: would be able to break through my "armor"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The next time I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seem genuinely perplexed... it's me, "thousand arms" cracker!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Weren't you listening the first time I told you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bwaha Haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This armor was a favorite of mine...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: armor?! That can't be... I saw you coughing up blood!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that? That was simply a special connection of jam I made up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth of the matter is, I'm actually a Biscuit human that ate the "Bisc Bisc Fruit"**!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can produce as many biscuits as my heart desires and manipulate them in ways you could never imagine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's see... for the outer lining of my armor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I simply scrounged up some crumbs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With a bit of patience and precision like crafts- manship... Tada! Even mere crumbs can be shaped and molded into the face of a powerful warrior!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In recent years, objects as simple and basic as biscuits have been evolving...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...in both shape and form, by the hands of gifted craftsmen such as myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, if it makes you feel any better... you're one of the very few who've managed to force me to reveal my true identity!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the house was that I was in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You needn't look any further than the wanted poster of "me" that the world government has been spreading around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't picture myself, but rather my armor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It just so happens that I absolutely despise pain... hell, I can't even stand the prick of a shot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so that's where my "armor" comes into play.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I simply control my perfectly crafted masterpieces... and make new ones if the situation calls for it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the power and beauty of my biscuits... saying my strength is limitless doesn't do it justice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It took everything you had to defeat a 'guy'...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who was nothing more than one of the infinite amount of biscuits I have at my Beck and call... I literally only have to lift a single finger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: where where

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Has it finally gotten through that thick skull of yours... Why you'll never even sniff Vinsmoke Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: you haven't seen the last of me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm gonna see him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kid, it's time I teach you a very important life lesson... there will always be people you come across in life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that no matter how much you want to or try to defeat them... you'll always end up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Falling Short!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Organis

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
